title: FastAPI Developer
responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: BrightLabs is hiring a junior fastapi developer to support developing backend services, APIs, and data-driven platform features.
raw_text: Vacancy V015: FastAPI Developer at BrightLabs. Location: Remote. Employment: contract. Required experience: 0.7 years. Required skills: python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker, redis, celery, sqlalchemy. Optional skills: terraform, prometheus, microservices. Responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring.
